reviews.comment:
Estaba haciendo la fila en el canal de varios autos estacionados cuando Gabi el playero vino y me dijo que sí cargaba súper le dan otros surtidores que estaban sin fila. Y la atención claro y la tensión en el servicompras excelente de Jessica

(Translated by Google)
I was waiting in line in the lane of several parked cars when Gabi the beach attendant came by and told me that if I filled up Supermarkets, they'd give them other pumps that didn't have a line. And the service, of course, and the tension at Jessica's shopping service were excellent.

reviews.comment:
Si bien se presenta la complejidad que los distintos tipos de diésel están en islas diferentes, por lo que si no se conoce el lugar hay que hacer maniobras entre el espacio un tanto reducido y el tránsito, los empleados son muy eficientes y amables, y colaboran con los conductores. Especialmente Guido, oriundo de la zona de Bolívar, pcia. Bs. As.

(Translated by Google)
While the fact that the different types of diesel are stored on separate islands presents a challenge, requiring maneuvering in the somewhat confined space and amidst traffic if you're unfamiliar with the area, the employees are very efficient and friendly, and they assist drivers. Guido, in particular, is from the Bolívar area in Buenos Aires province.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from Guido, very kind and helpful. The wait is no problem when you receive such friendly service. Thank you, Guido!

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atencion del playero Guido. Llegamos cuando la estación realizaba descarga de combustible. Guido se ocupó de que se respete el orden de los vehiculos, luego una vez que avanzamos los distribuyo de acuerdo al tipo de combustible que cada uno cargaria. Recomiendo a todo aquel que viaje hasta Fiambala, es la ultima YPF en esa dirección.

(Translated by Google)
Very good service from the beach attendant, Guido. We arrived as the station was unloading fuel. Guido made sure the vehicles were in order, and once we were moving, he arranged the vehicles according to the type of fuel each person would be loading. I recommend him to anyone traveling to Fiambala; it's the last YPF station in that direction.
